type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Dryer equipment changes from Rotary dryer to Belt dryer in May 2020.
Higher NG consumption (52% increase). 
Increased production and 100% increase in source testing results for PM emission rates. 
Stockpiles emissions added. 
Cyclofilter emissions added.
